description_long: This is a modern mountain bicycle featuring a robust diamond-shaped frame with a matte black and yellow color scheme. It is equipped with front and rear suspension systems, disc brakes, and thick, knobby tires designed for off-road and urban terrain. The handlebars are flat and wide, providing stability and control, while the seat is a standard saddle mounted on an adjustable post. The bicycle includes front and rear fenders for protection against splashes, and a visible battery pack suggests it is an electric-assist model. The drivetrain consists of a rear derailleur and multiple gears, making it suitable for varied inclines and surfaces.
description: A black and yellow mountain bicycle with front and rear suspension, disc brakes, and a flat handlebar, designed for rugged urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full diamond frame, battery pack, suspension, and drivetrain details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat handlebars, front suspension fork, and disc brake.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the frame, rear suspension, and gear system.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the seat, rear fender, and rear wheel alignment.
